title: bidens coreopsidis var. incisa
intro: Bidens coreopsidis var. incisa, also known as Cut-leaved Beggarticks, is a variant of the Bidens coreopsidis plant, a species of flowering plant in the aster family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Cut-leaved Beggarticks include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
